"; $replacement = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $modified = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", $replacement, $original); echo $modified; ?> This code replaces the URL "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1" with "http://yahoo.com/abc1" in the given string. The replacement is done using `str_replace`, which works for repeated occurrences of the URL. A palindrome in the response could be: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
